purpose: Replace unsourced 100us SC reference (v1) and unextractable PRNewswire 2025-03 (v2 INDETERMINATE) with a citable peer-reviewed tau_2 (T2 echo / T2*) value for F-N12-1 ratio test.

publication.title: Methods to achieve near-millisecond energy relaxation and dephasing times for a superconducting transmon qubit

primary_recommendation.rationale: Peer-reviewed Nature Communications 2025 publication, gives explicit numerical T2 echo of 1.06 ms on tantalum transmon — the current SOTA for SC. Citable as the 'best reasonably achievable SC tau_2' upper-bound reference.

secondary_reference_typical_IBM_fleet.publication_class: fleet specs disclosed via IBM Quantum hardware page + IBM/Wikipedia transmon entry
secondary_reference_typical_IBM_fleet.T2_typical_us: comparable to T1 within factor 2 for echo-protected transmons
secondary_reference_typical_IBM_fleet.rationale: For a 'representative production SC qubit' rather than SOTA, use IBM fleet median T2 ~100us. This is the working reference for F-N12-1 v3 because the test substrate (ibm_kingston Heron r2) sits in this regime.

publication.title: Millisecond lifetimes and coherence times in 2D transmon qubits

tertiary_reference_2D_transmon_record.rationale: Highest published T1 (1.68 ms) in 2D transmons, time-averaged Q = 9.7e6 across 45 qubits. Use as 'absolute SC ceiling' bound.

F_N12_1_v3_reference_choice.primary_for_ratio_denominator_source: IBM Heron r2 fleet typical T2 (matches v3 substrate)
F_N12_1_v3_reference_choice.rationale: Use 100us (matched-substrate) as primary denominator: it is the actual T2 of the device the v3 measurement runs on, eliminating cross-device confound. Use 1060us as a robustness-bound check: if the Heron r2-measured tau_2 exceeds 1.06 ms, that itself is a discovery (better-than-SOTA), independent of Orch-OR. Both numbers are now citable, replacing the v1 unsourced placeholder.

prnewswire_2025_03_status.v2_finding: PRNewswire 2025-03 release (cited in N-20 doc) contains no extractable T2/tau_2 numeric. Defers technical data to a 'forthcoming GitHub repository' that is not yet published as of 2026-05-01.
prnewswire_2025_03_status.decision: DROP from F-N12-1 reference set. Replace with peer-reviewed Nature/NatComm citations above.
